item.title: 苹果承认 AI 落后，用「AI App Store」换一条活路
item.guid: 苹果承认-AI-落后，用「AI-App-Store」换一条活路
item.description:
Yesterday, Bloomberg reporter Mark Gurman pointed out in his latest PowerOn column that Apple has admitted its own AI technology lags behind competitors like ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude, with no hope of catching up in the short term. 昨天，彭博社记者 Mark Gurman 在最新的 PowerOn 专栏文章中指出，苹果已承认自家 AI 技术落后于 ChatGPT、Gemini 及 Claude 等竞争对手，且短期内无望赶上。

Facing this reality, Apple has chosen to abandon direct competition and instead profit from hardware sales and its service ecosystem. 面对这一现实，苹果选择放弃正面竞争，转向依靠硬件销售与服务生态获利。

The core of the new strategy is the "Siri Extensions" feature, set to launch with iOS 27, which will allow users to install and run third-party AI chat tools within Siri, and will feature a dedicated section in the App Store. 新战略的核心是即将随 iOS 27 推出的「Siri 扩展」（Extensions）功能，允许用户在 Siri 中安装并运行第三方 AI 聊天工具，并在 App Store 中开辟专属区域。

Through this platform, Apple can continuously generate revenue from third-party AI service providers by leveraging the App Store's 30% commission mechanism . At the same time, Apple is also integrating Gemini technology to enhance Siri and other AI features, ensuring a basic user experience. 通过这一平台，苹果可 借助 App Store 30% 的抽成机制，从第三方 AI 服务商持续获取收入 。与此同时，苹果也在引入 Gemini 技术来强化 Siri 及其他 AI 功能、保证基础体验。

Gurman also revealed on X that Apple's 50th-anniversary celebration series will conclude this week with a grand finale party for employees, held at the Apple Park headquarters in Cupertino. Gurman 还在 X 透露，苹果 50 周年系列庆典将于本周以一场面向员工的压轴派对收官，地点设在位于库比蒂诺的 Apple Park 总部。

He stated that employees were ecstatic after learning about the headlining performer and provided three clues: 'He is still active,' 'Was part of the British Invasion,' and 'Jobs would be thrilled about this.' 他表示，员工们在获悉头条表演嘉宾后情绪高涨，并给出了三条线索：「他依然活跃」、「曾是英伦入侵的一部分」、「乔布斯会为此欣喜若狂」。

Based on various inferences, the headlining guest can almost certainly be identified as Paul McCartney. 综合多方推断，头条嘉宾几乎可以确定是 Paul McCartney。

The British Invasion specifically refers to the cultural wave in the 1960s when British rock bands, represented by The Beatles, swept across America, and McCartney remains active on global performance stages to this day. 英伦入侵（British Invasion）特指 1960 年代以披头士乐队为代表的英国摇滚乐团席卷美国的文化浪潮，而 McCartney 至今仍活跃于全球演出舞台。

Steve Jobs was an avid fan of The Beatles during his lifetime, and he once publicly stated: 乔布斯生前是披头士的狂热粉丝，他曾公开表示：

My business model is The Beatles... They balanced each other, and the whole was greater than the sum of its parts. Business greatness is never achieved by one person alone.

item.title: DeepSeek 崩了，一夜未恢复
item.description:
On the evening of March 29, DeepSeek services once again experienced widespread access anomalies. 3 月 29 日晚，DeepSeek 服务再次出现大规模访问异常。

The web and app versions frequently displayed 'server busy' or became unresponsive, with many users encountering service anomalies and inability to send messages normally. The related topic #DeepSeekCrashed# topped Weibo's hot search list. 网页端与 App 频繁提示「服务器繁忙」或无法响应，大量用户遭遇服务异常、无法正常发送消息等问题。相关话题 #DeepSeek 崩了# 冲上微博热搜榜首。

As of publication, services have not yet fully recovered. 截至发稿，服务尚未完全恢复。

item.title: 宇树科技亚洲首店五月落地上海
item.guid: 宇树科技亚洲首店五月落地上海
item.description:
According to the official WeChat account of Shanghai Jing'an, Unitree Robotics' Embodied AI Experience Center, its first store in Asia, will officially open at Jiuguang Department Store in Shanghai's Jing'an Nanjing West Road business district by the end of May. The store covers an area of over 100 square meters and will showcase the brand's full range of latest products. 据上海静安官微消息，宇树科技具身智能体验馆亚洲首店将于 5 月底在上海静安南京西路商圈的久光百货正式开业。门店面积超 100 平方米，届时将展出品牌全线最新产品。

Li Binjie, Senior Vice President of Unitree Robotics, introduced yesterday at the 2026 National Boutique Premiere Season and 'First Release Shanghai' series event launch ceremony that the experience store will be built as an immersive experience center, using embodied AI technology to create new consumption scenarios and promote robot technology into urban daily life. 宇树科技高级副总裁李斌杰昨天在 2026 全国精品首发季暨「首发上海」系列活动发布仪式上介绍，该体验店将打造为沉浸式体验中心，以具身智能科技构建全新消费场景，推动机器人技术走进城市日常生活。

At the same event, Unitree Robotics also unveiled its full-size embodied robot H2. This robot stands 1.8 meters tall, possesses 31 degrees of joint freedom, is equipped with self-developed high-performance motion control algorithms and a general large model, and is positioned as an intelligent companion for future daily life. 同场活动上，宇树科技还发布了全尺寸具身机器人 H2。该机器人身高 1.8 米，具备 31 个关节自由度，搭载自研高性能运动控制算法与通用大模型，定位为未来日常生活中的智能伙伴。

Additionally, Unitree Robotics' G1 humanoid robot and Go2 robot dog also made their debut simultaneously in the 'First Release Shanghai' garden party exhibition area. 此外，宇树科技的 G1 人形机器人与 Go2 机器狗也在「首发上海」游园会展览区域同步亮相。

item.title: 引发存储股暴跌的 Google 论文遭学术不端指控
item.guid: 引发存储股暴跌的-Google-论文遭学术不端指控
item.description:
Google Research's recently published AI compression algorithm paper, TurboQuant, has faced accusations of academic misconduct. Within 24 hours of its release, the paper garnered over ten million views, storage chip stocks collectively closed lower that day, and Cloudflare CEO Matthew Prince called it Google's 'DeepSeek moment.' Google Research 近日发布的 AI 压缩算法论文 TurboQuant 遭到学术不端指控。该论文发布后 24 小时内浏览量破千万，存储芯片股当天集体收跌，Cloudflare CEO Matthew Prince 称其为 Google 的「DeepSeek 时刻」。

Gao Jianyang, a postdoctoral researcher at ETH Zurich and the first author of the vector quantization algorithm RaBitQ, recently issued an open clarification letter on Zhihu, pointing out three serious issues with TurboQuant: 苏黎世联邦理工学院博士后、向量量化算法 RaBitQ 的第一作者高健扬近日在知乎发出公开澄清信，指出 TurboQuant 存在三处严重问题：

    Deliberately avoiding direct association with RaBitQ in its core method (random rotation transformation);

    Characterizing RaBitQ's theoretical achievements as 'suboptimal' without any evidence;

    And in experimental comparisons, running RaBitQ on a single-core CPU while running TurboQuant on an A100 GPU, with neither point disclosed in the paper.

More critically, the aforementioned issues were explicitly communicated to the TurboQuant team via email before the paper's submission, and the team acknowledged awareness but chose not to make corrections. 更关键的是，上述问题在论文投稿前已通过邮件明确告知 TurboQuant 团队，对方表示知情，却选择不予修正。

Currently, TurboQuant's first author, Amir Zandieh, has only committed to correcting two issues: experimental and theoretical descriptions, refusing to directly discuss the methodological similarities between the two papers, and stating that corrections will only be made after the ICLR 2026 official conference concludes. 目前，TurboQuant 第一作者 Amir Zandieh 仅承诺修正实验与理论描述两处问题，拒绝正面讨论两篇论文的方法相似性，且表示要等 ICLR 2026 正式会议结束后才做修正。

Gao Jianyang's team has published public comments on ICLR OpenReview, submitted a formal complaint to relevant ICLR officials with a complete email evidence package, and stated that they will subsequently publish a detailed technical report on arXiv. 高健扬团队已在 ICLR OpenReview 发布公开评论，并向 ICLR 相关负责人提交正式投诉，附完整邮件证据包，还表示后续将在 arXiv 发布详细技术报告。

🔗 Related reading: Just triggered a crash in storage stocks and then collapsed? Google's viral AI paper accused of academic misconduct 🔗 相关阅读： 刚引发存储股暴跌就塌房？Google 刷屏 AI 论文遭指控学术不端

item.title: OpenAI 一周砍掉三款产品，成人聊天功能无限期搁置
item.guid: OpenAI-一周砍掉三款产品，成人聊天功能无限期搁置
item.description:
According to the Financial Times, OpenAI has indefinitely shelved plans to develop an adult chat feature. 据《金融时报》报道，OpenAI 已无限期搁置成人聊天功能的开发计划。

This is the third product OpenAI has cut in the same week. Previously, OpenAI announced the shutdown of the Sora video generation App and abandoned ChatGPT's built-in shopping feature "Instant Checkout". 这是 OpenAI 在同一周内砍掉的第三款产品。此前，OpenAI 宣布关停 Sora 视频生成 App，并放弃了 ChatGPT 内置的购物功能「即时结账」。

The report stated that the adult chat feature was originally planned to launch in December last year, but after internal discussions on whether to cancel it entirely, it has been confirmed to be indefinitely postponed with no clear release timeline. 报道称，成人聊天功能原计划于去年 12 月上线，但在内部讨论是否彻底取消后，已确认无限期推迟，且无明确发布时间表。

OpenAI stated that long-term research on the impact of explicit chat content and emotional attachment is needed before incorporating it into product development, and admitted that there is currently no "empirical basis". OpenAI 表示，在将其纳入产品开发之前，需要对露骨聊天内容及情感依附所产生的影响进行长期研究，并承认目前尚无「实证依据」。

OpenAI's annualized revenue this year exceeded $25 billion, but it is projected to lose $14 billion and consume $17 billion in cash by 2026. The company is expected to IPO as early as the fourth quarter of this year, with a valuation target of $830 billion. OpenAI 今年年化收入突破 250 亿美元，但 2026 年预计亏损 140 亿美元、现金消耗达 170 亿美元，公司最快于今年第四季度 IPO，估值目标 8300 亿美元。

Before filing for an IPO, every product that could pose headline risk is a potential liability. OpenAI CFO Sarah Friar stated this week that the company "faces a shortage of computing power" and has to make difficult trade-offs. 在提交招股书前，每一个可能引发头条风险的产品都是潜在负债。OpenAI CFO Sarah Friar 本周表示，公司「面临算力短缺」，不得不做出艰难取舍。

item.title: xAI 联合创始人全数离职，马斯克「从零重建」AI 公司
item.guid: xAI-联合创始人全数离职，马斯克「从零重建」AI-公司
item.description:
According to TechCrunch and Business Insider, all members of the xAI co-founder team have resigned. 据 TechCrunch 及《商业内幕》报道，xAI 联合创始人团队已全员离职。

Following the departure of several co-founders earlier this month, the last two remaining co-founders, Manuel Kroiss and Ross Nordeen, have also successively left the company. 继本月初多名联合创始人相继出走后，最后留守的两位联合创始人 Manuel Kroiss 与 Ross Nordeen 也已先后离开公司。

Kroiss informed those around him last week that he would be leaving, while Nordeen officially left earlier, and his xAI employee verification badge on the X platform subsequently disappeared. As of now, none of the 11 co-founders who established xAI with Elon Musk remain. Kroiss 上周告知周围人士他将离职，Nordeen 则于更早前正式离开，其在 X 平台上的 xAI 员工认证标识也随之消失。 至此，与马斯克共同创立 xAI 的 11 位联合创始人已无一留存。

Nordeen, 36, previously reported directly to Elon Musk at xAI, serving as his core right-hand man, responsible for coordinating key company affairs and driving the implementation of various tasks. He graduated from Michigan Technological University and co-founded the AI company with Musk in 2023. Nordeen 今年 36 岁，此前在 xAI 直接向马斯克汇报工作，是其核心得力助手，负责统筹公司核心事务、推动各项工作落地执行。他毕业于密歇根理工大学，2023 年追随马斯克联合创立了这家 AI 公司。

After Musk acquired Twitter in 2022, Nordeen was also one of the key personnel who assisted Musk in leading large-scale layoffs. Kroiss, on the other hand, led xAI's pre-training team. 2022 年马斯克收购推特后，Nordeen 也曾是协助马斯克主导大规模裁员的核心人员之一。Kroiss 则主导 xAI 的预训练团队工作。

item.title: 「杭州六小龙」第一股通过港交所聆讯
item.guid: 「杭州六小龙」第一股通过港交所聆讯
item.description:
According to a report by Cailian Press citing disclosures from the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, Manycore Tech Inc., a spatial intelligence unicorn company, updated its post-hearing information pack yesterday and officially passed the HKEX listing hearing, entering the final sprint phase of its Hong Kong IPO process. 据财联社援引港交所披露报道，空间智能独角兽公司群核科技（Manycore Tech Inc.）昨日更新聆讯后资料集，正式通过港交所上市聆讯，港股 IPO 进程进入最终冲刺阶段。

If successfully listed, Manycore Tech will become the "first global spatial intelligence stock" and also the first company among "Hangzhou's Six Little Dragons" to complete an IPO. 若顺利完成挂牌，群核科技将成为「全球空间智能第一股」，同时也将是「杭州六小龙」中首家完成 IPO 的企业。

Manycore Tech was co-founded by Huang Xiaohuang, Chen Hang, and Zhu Hao in 2011. Before the IPO, Chairman Huang Xiaohuang held 15.46% of the shares, CEO Chen Hang held 11.04%, and CTO Zhu Hao held 4.22%; among institutional shareholders, IDG Capital held approximately 12.89%, Hillhouse Capital held approximately 12.6%, and GGV Capital held approximately 11.52%. 群核科技由黄晓煌、陈航、朱皓于 2011 年联合创办。IPO 前，董事长黄晓煌持股 15.46%，CEO 陈航持股 11.04%，CTO 朱皓持股 4.22%；机构股东中，IDG 资本持股约 12.89%，高瓴资本持股约 12.6%，纪源资本持股约 11.52%。

The proceeds from this IPO will primarily be used for international expansion, product feature enhancement and new product development, domestic sales and brand promotion, core technology and infrastructure investment, and general working capital purposes. 本次 IPO 募集资金将主要用于国际扩张、产品功能增强与新品研发、国内销售及品牌推广、核心技术与基础设施投资，以及一般营运资金用途。

It is worth noting that other members of "Hangzhou's Six Little Dragons" are also accelerating their IPO processes: the Shanghai Stock Exchange has accepted Unitree Robotics' STAR Market IPO application, Cloudwalk Technology is currently in the IPO coaching phase, and StrongMind Technology has reportedly submitted a confidential Hong Kong IPO application. 值得关注的是，「杭州六小龙」中的其他成员也在加速推进上市进程：上交所已受理宇树科技科创板 IPO 申请，云深处科技目前处于上市辅导阶段，强脑科技据报道已以保密形式提交港股 IPO 申请。

item.title: 智驾车专属保险率先落地北京，覆盖 L2 ~ L4
item.guid: 智驾车专属保险率先落地北京，覆盖-L2-~-L4
item.description:
According to CCTV News, the Beijing Financial Regulatory Bureau announced yesterday that Beijing has taken the lead nationwide in launching the development and application of exclusive commercial insurance products for intelligent connected new energy vehicles, filling a gap in the current car insurance system for intelligent driving scenarios. 据央视新闻报道，北京金融监管局昨日宣布，北京率先在全国启动智能网联新能源汽车专属商业保险产品的开发应用，填补了现行车险体系在智能驾驶场景下的保障空白。

According to the introduction, the new product covers L2 to L4 full-level intelligent connected new energy vehicles. The overall pricing is expected to be on par with existing car insurance, with appropriate adjustments based on the scope of coverage. 据介绍，新产品覆盖 L2 至 L4 全级别智能网联新能源汽车，整体定价预计与现有车险持平，并视保障责任范围做适度调整。

L2-level vehicles will primarily be new cars in the initial stage, and owners can choose exclusive products or continue with existing car insurance when purchasing; L3 and L4-level vehicles must be models that have obtained testing qualifications or official road permits in Beijing. The Beijing Insurance Industry Association will announce the list of applicable car manufacturers and models in batches. L2 级车辆初期以新车为主，车主可在购车时自行选择专属产品或沿用现有车险；L3、L4 级车辆则须为已在北京取得测试资质或正式上路许可的车型。北京保险行业协会将分批次公布适用车企和车型名单。

The report further points out that with the accumulation of underwriting and claims data, car manufacturers' intelligent driving technology levels will also be incorporated into the pricing model in the future, meaning that the more mature the technology and the better the safety record of an intelligent driving system, the lower the premium it will theoretically receive . 报道进一步指出，随着承保理赔数据的积累，车企的智驾技术水平未来也将被纳入定价模型，意味着 技术越成熟、安全记录越好的智驾系统，理论上将获得更低的保费 。

item.title: DNG 正式成为相机 RAW 格式国际标准
item.guid: DNG-正式成为相机-RAW-格式国际标准
item.description:
According to PetaPixel, the RAW image format DNG (Digital Negative) officially received certification from the International Organization for Standardization (ISO) last week, becoming the official international standard for RAW images, with standard number ISO 12234-4:2026. 据 PetaPixel 报道，RAW 图像格式 DNG（数字负片，Digital Negative）上周正式获得国际标准化组织（ISO）认证，成为官方 RAW 图像国际标准，标准编号为 ISO 12234-4:2026。

DNG was introduced by Adobe in 2004, and its core advantage lies in its openness. Currently, brands such as Leica, Ricoh, Sigma, and Pentax support direct shooting of DNG format files in their cameras. DNG 由 Adobe 于 2004 年推出，其核心优势在于开放性。目前，徕卡、理光、适马、宾得等品牌已在旗下相机中支持直接拍摄 DNG 格式文件。

Unlike proprietary RAW formats from various manufacturers such as Sony .ARW, Nikon .NEF, Canon .CR2, and Fujifilm .RAF, DNG has complete public technical documentation, and its compatibility and long-term archiving capabilities far exceed those of private formats. 与索尼 .ARW、尼康 .NEF、佳能 .CR2、富士 .RAF 等各厂商专有 RAW 格式不同，DNG 拥有完整公开的技术文档，兼容性与长期存档能力都远超私有格式。

The ISO 12234-4:2026 standard document clearly defines the DNG format specifications and implementation paths, providing clear guidance for various hardware and software manufacturers. ISO 12234-4:2026 标准文件明确定义了 DNG 的格式规范与实现路径，为各硬件及软件厂商提供了清晰的落地指引。

item.title: 国产 60kW 增程式混动航空发动机完成飞行验证
item.guid: 国产-60kW-增程式混动航空发动机完成飞行验证
item.description:
According to CCTV reports, the 60-kilowatt range-extended hybrid electric propulsion system developed by Sichuan Tianfu Lightweight Power Technology Co., Ltd. has completed flight demonstration and verification. 据央视报道，由四川天府轻型动力科技有限公司研发的 60 千瓦增程式混合动力电推进系统已完成飞行演示验证。

According to the introduction, the system adopts a range-extended hybrid solution: a gas turbine drives a generator to charge the battery, while the aircraft's flight thrust is entirely provided by electric ducted fans. 据介绍，该系统采用增程式混动方案：燃气涡轮机驱动发电机为电池充电，飞机的飞行推力则完全由电动涵道风扇提供。

The system is compact and can generate electricity while flying, which extends the range and eliminates long ground charging waiting times, enhancing the drone's rapid deployment capability. During flight, the gas turbine can be shut down at any time to switch to pure electric mode, reducing thermal radiation characteristics and further improving the silent effect. 系统体积小巧，可在飞行过程中边飞边发电，既延长航程，又省去漫长的地面充电等待时间，提升了无人机的快速出动能力。飞行中还可随时关闭燃气涡轮机、切换至纯电模式，以降低热辐射特征、进一步提升静音效果。

item.title: 王兴兴：具身智能「GPT 时刻」大概还需两到三年
item.guid: 王兴兴：具身智能「GPT-时刻」大概还需两到三年
item.description:
According to CCTV News, Wang Xingxing, founder and CEO of Unitree Robotics, appeared yesterday at the 2026 China Internet Media Forum, delivering a speech titled "When Robots Go Viral," making several predictions regarding the athletic capabilities of humanoid robots and the development prospects of embodied AI. 据央视新闻报道，宇树科技创始人兼 CEO 王兴兴昨天亮相 2026 中国网络媒体论坛，以《当机器人刷屏》为题发表演讲，就人形机器人的运动能力与具身智能的发展前景作出多项预测。

Wang Xingxing stated that in the humanoid robot half-marathon race to be held next month in Yizhuang, Beijing, robots from several companies will "run faster than humans," and half-marathon times are expected to be under 1 hour . 王兴兴表示，下月在北京亦庄举行的人形机器人半程马拉松比赛中，多家公司的机器人将「跑得比人快」， 半马成绩有望跑进 1 小时以内 。

Previously, Unitree Robotics had won multiple championships in the 1500m, 400m, 4 × 100m relay, and 100m hurdles at the 2025 World Humanoid Robot Games held in August last year, with its 1500m time already entering the 6-minute range. 此前，宇树科技已在去年 8 月举办的 2025 世界人形机器人运动会上斩获 1500 米、400 米、4 × 100 米接力及 100 米障碍赛多项冠军，其中 1500 米成绩已进入 6 分钟区间。

Regarding industry prospects, Wang Xingxing spoke of the "ChatGPT moment" for embodied AI: bringing a robot into an unfamiliar environment, and through voice commands, the robot can complete 80% to 90% of tasks. 在行业前景方面，王兴兴谈到具身智能的「ChatGPT 时刻」：将一台机器人带入陌生场景，通过语音指令，机器人能完成 80% 至 90% 的任务。

He believes that this turning point will take approximately two to three more years to arrive , but he also mentioned that a friend who returned from Silicon Valley in the United States holds a more optimistic view, believing it can be achieved within 18 months. Wang Xingxing also emphasized, "There will definitely be very significant technological advancements awaiting everyone this year or next year" . 他认为，这一拐点大约还需两到三年才能到来 ，但他也提到，一位从美国硅谷回国的朋友对此持更乐观的态度，认为 18 个月内即可实现。王兴兴同时强调， 「今年或明年一定会有非常大的技术进步在等待着大家」 。

item.title: 💡 苹果高管：未来 50 年 iPhone 仍是 AI 时代的核心
item.guid: 💡-苹果高管：未来-50-年-iPhone-仍是-AI-时代的核心
item.description:
Recently, Apple CEO Tim Cook, Senior Vice President of Worldwide Marketing Greg Joswiak, and Senior Vice President of Hardware Engineering John Ternus were interviewed by Wired, revealing Apple's strategic direction in the AI era and its development blueprint for the next 50 years. 近日，苹果 CEO Tim Cook、全球营销高级副总裁 Greg Joswiak 与硬件工程高级副总裁 John Ternus 接受了《连线》的专访，对外披露了苹果在 AI 时代的战略方向与未来 50 年的发展蓝图。

Addressing external doubts about Apple "missing the AI era," Joswiak stated frankly, "We (Apple) were already doing AI before it was even called AI." 针对外界对苹果「错失 AI 时代」的质疑，Joswiak 直言，「我们（苹果）在还没叫它 AI 的时候就已经在做 AI 了」。

Ternus further emphasized that even if Apple does not personally develop underlying large models, Apple's hardware products remain the best platform for global users to experience existing AI tools. Ternus 则进一步强调，即便苹果不亲自开发底层大模型，苹果的硬件产品依然是全球用户体验现有 AI 工具的最佳平台。

Facing the endless stream of AI-specific hardware on the market, Joswiak predicted, "50 years from now, people will still be using iPhones." 面对市场上层出不穷的 AI 专属硬件，Joswiak 判断道，「50 年后，人们依然会使用 iPhone」。

He pointed out that the fundamental reason other companies are scrambling to develop new AI devices is that "they don't have an iPhone," and Apple believes that most so-called innovative AI hardware in the future will ultimately become accessories for the iPhone. 他指出，其他企业之所以竞相研发新型 AI 设备，根本原因在于「他们没有 iPhone」，而苹果认为，未来大多数所谓的创新 AI 硬件，最终都将沦为 iPhone 的附属配件。

The iPhone will not disappear; the iPhone will play a central role in everything you talk about.

When asked if Apple would introduce "AI executives" within the next 50 years, Cook smiled and rejected the idea, explicitly stating that AI Agents would never appear on Apple's leadership team roster, and humans would always be in control of the company. 当被问及苹果是否会在未来 50 年内引入「AI 高管」时，库克笑着否决了这一设想，明确表示苹果的领导团队名单里绝不会出现 AI Agent，人类将始终掌控这家公司。

item.title: 16.98 万元起，广汽丰田铂智 7 正式上市
item.guid: 16.98-万元起，广汽丰田铂智-7-正式上市
item.description:
Yesterday, GAC Toyota bZ7 was officially released and launched, offering 6 versions with official guide prices ranging from 169,800 yuan to 229,800 yuan. 昨天，广汽丰田铂智 7 正式发布并上市，共推出 6 个版本，官方指导价区间为 16.98 万元至 22.98 万元。

    Body dimensions are 5130/1965/1500mm, with a wheelbase of 3020mm;

    The battery offers two specifications: a 71.35kWh battery pack corresponds to a 600km range, while an 88.13kWh battery pack offers three range versions of 680km, 700km, and 710km depending on the configuration;

    Equipped with Huawei HarmonyOS Cockpit 5, 27 high-precision sensors including lidar, supporting functions such as high-speed navigation, urban navigation, and memory parking;

    Adopts Huawei DriveONE dual-motor electric drive system, with a maximum power of 207kW and a top speed of 180km/h;

    All models come standard with dual-chamber air springs and SDC shock absorbers, tuned by Toyota GR (Gazoo Racing) and Lexus teams;

In addition, GAC Toyota also announced a partnership with Xiaomi, opening up hardware ecosystem interfaces, which will enable in-car devices to connect to Xiaomi's smart home ecosystem in the future. 此外，广汽丰田还宣布与小米达成合作，开放硬件生态接口，未来车载设备将有望接入小米智能家居生态。

Addressing external doubts about battery brands, GAC Toyota stated that it does not solely rely on brand recognition and adopts a "nurturing procurement" model – engineers are stationed at battery factories 2 years in advance to propose over 300 safety standards for the bZ7 and verify 26 key processes. 针对外界对电池品牌的质疑，广汽丰田表示不唯品牌知名度论，并采用「育成式采购」模式——工程师提前 2 年反向进驻电池厂，围绕铂智 7 提出超 300 项安全标准，验证 26 道关键工序。

🔗 Related reading: Starting from 169,800 yuan! Toyota's "assembled car" bZ7 is equipped with Huawei, Momenta, and Xiaomi 🔗 相关阅读： 16.98 万元起！丰田这台「拼好车」铂智 7，把华为、Momenta、小米都装上了

item.title: 4300 元，卡西欧推出限量版漆艺计算器
item.guid: 4300-元，卡西欧推出限量版漆艺计算器
item.description:
According to The Verge, Casio recently launched a limited edition luxury calculator called the S100X "The Special One," which combines traditional Japanese lacquer art with modern electronics, priced at approximately $624 (about 4312 yuan RMB). 据 The Verge 报道，卡西欧近日推出了一款名为 S100X「The Special One」的限量版豪华计算器，将传统日本漆艺工艺与现代电子产品相结合，定价约 624 美元（约合 4312 元人民币）。

The calculator's body is crafted from milled aluminum alloy, with its surface hand-coated with "Maki-e" ebony lacquer (Urushi) by Ryuji Umeda, chief artisan of Yamakyu Shitsuki, a traditional lacquerware workshop with nearly a century of history located in Sabae City, Fukui Prefecture. The entire lacquer art process takes a full month to complete. 该计算器的机身采用铣削铝合金打造，表面由位于福井县鲭江市、拥有近百年历史的传统漆器工坊 Yamakyu Shitsuki 的首席工匠梅田龙二（Ryuji Umeda）手工涂抹「莳绘」乌木漆（Urushi），完成整个漆艺处理过程耗时整整一个月。

Due to the intricate craftsmanship, only 650 units are available worldwide. 由于工艺繁复，此次全球限量仅 650 台。

In terms of features, the S100X is equipped with a wide 12-digit display, with a screen tone inspired by fountain pen ink blue, supporting currency conversion and tax rate calculation. The body has a built-in solar panel, which, combined with a button battery, provides up to seven years of battery life with approximately one hour of daily use. 功能层面，S100X 配备宽幅 12 位数字显示屏，屏幕色调取自钢笔墨水蓝，支持货币换算和税率计算。机身内置太阳能面板，配合一枚纽扣电池，在每天使用约一小时的情况下，续航可达七年。

item.title: 卡车连货「0 元购」，12 吨 F1 联名 KitKat 巧克力在欧洲转运途中失窃
item.guid: 卡车连货「0-元购」，12-吨-F1-联名-KitKat-巧克力在欧洲转运途中失窃
item.description:
According to The New York Times and ABC News, Nestlé recently disclosed that a batch of approximately 12 tons of F1 co-branded KitKat chocolate bars was stolen during transit in Europe, and the truck involved is still missing. 据《纽约时报》和 ABC News 报道，雀巢日前披露，一批重约 12 吨的 F1 联名 KitKat 巧克力棒在欧洲转运途中遭窃，涉事卡车至今下落不明。

The stolen goods totaled 413,793 bars, part of KitKat's "New Chocolate Series" launched this year. The batch departed from a production base in central Italy, was originally destined for Poland, and was planned to travel approximately 1,250 to 1,350 kilometers before reaching a distribution warehouse, but went missing at some point between leaving the production site and arriving at the delivery destination. 此次被盗货物共计 413,793 根，属于 KitKat 今年推出的「新巧克力系列」。该批货物从意大利中部生产基地出发，原定运往波兰，计划途经约 1,250 至 1,350 公里后抵达分拨仓库，但在离开生产地与抵达配送地之间的某一环节失踪。

KitKat responded in a self-deprecating tone in a statement: "While we acknowledge that these criminals indeed have exceptional taste, cargo theft remains a serious and escalating problem affecting businesses of all sizes." KitKat 在声明中以自嘲口吻回应称：「虽然我们认可这些犯罪分子的品味确实非同一般，但货物盗窃仍然是一个正在不断升级、影响各类规模企业的严重问题。」

KitKat stated that this incident is not an isolated case. A joint report by the International Union of Marine Insurance (IUMI) and the Transported Asset Protection Association (TAPA) EMEA indicates that cargo theft and freight fraud in Europe are escalating, with increasingly sophisticated methods. KitKat 表示，此次事件并非孤立案例。国际海上保险联合会（IUMI）与运输资产保护协会（TAPA）EMEA 联合发布的一份报告指出，欧洲货物盗窃与货运欺诈正呈现出愈演愈烈的态势，作案手法也日趋复杂。

Nestlé stated that each KitKat is linked to a unique batch code. Consumers, retailers, and wholesalers can verify whether goods are stolen by scanning the batch number on the packaging. Once matched, the system will prompt relevant parties on how to report to the company, and Nestlé will hand over the evidence to relevant authorities for processing. 雀巢表示，每根 KitKat 均绑定了唯一批次编码，消费者、零售商及批发商可通过扫描包装上的批次号码核查是否属于被盗货物，一旦匹配，系统将提示相关方如何向公司举报，雀巢将把证据移交相关部门处理。

item.title: Valve 更新 Steam 全球定价体系
item.description:
According to TheGamer, Valve recently announced a major update to its Steam pricing tools, adding revised exchange rate conversion data and various pricing schemes, aimed at helping game developers more efficiently set reasonable prices for 35 global currencies and 4 regional groups. 据 TheGamer 报道，Valve 近日宣布对 Steam 定价工具进行重大更新，新增修订后的汇率转换数据及多种定价方案，旨在帮助游戏开发者更高效地为全球 35 种货币和 4 个地区组制定合理售价。

The core of this update is to provide developers with three new pricing conversion methods: 此次更新的核心是为开发者提供三种全新的定价转换方式：

    Standard exchange rate conversion: directly using real-time exchange rates for conversion;

    Purchasing power conversion: pricing based on public data of average consumer purchasing power in various regions;

    Multi-variable comprehensive pricing method: comprehensively considering local purchasing power, real-time exchange rates, and the local pricing level of similar entertainment products.

Valve stated that the "multi-variable comprehensive pricing method" is the closest to the method used by previous pricing tools. Valve 表示，「多变量综合定价法」与此前定价工具所采用的方法最为接近。

Previously, regional pricing discrepancies have long been a point of contention within the player community. For example, "Crimson Desert" is priced at $69.99 in the US but costs around $80 in Europe; "Metal Gear Solid Delta: Snake Eater" is also priced at $69.99 in the US, but its price in Poland converts to approximately $100. 此前，区域定价差异问题在玩家社区中长期存在争议。以《血色沙漠》为例，该游戏在美国定价 69.99 美元，在欧洲却高达约 80 美元；《合金装备 Delta：食蛇者》在美国同样定价 69.99 美元，而在波兰的售价则折合约 100 美元。

item.title: AI 水果恋综 10 天斩获 3 亿播放
item.guid: AI-水果恋综-10-天斩获-3-亿播放
item.description:
An AI-generated "fruit dating show" called "Fruit Love Island" recently went viral on TikTok. 一部由 AI 生成的「水果恋综」《Fruit Love Island》近日在 TikTok 上走红。

Since March 14, the account @ai.cinema021 has uploaded 19 episodes in just 9 days, each lasting 2 to 4 minutes. As of publication, it has accumulated over 300 million views, 24 million likes, and 3.3 million followers, with almost every episode exceeding 10 million views. 自 3 月 14 日起，账号 @ai.cinema021 在短短 9 天内上传了 19 集内容，每集时长 2 至 4 分钟，截至发稿已累计收获超 3 亿次播放、2400 万个赞和 330 万粉丝，几乎每集播放量均突破千万。

This short series is based on the British reality show "Love Island." The video footage shows obvious AI-generated flaws, and TikTok officially mandates a "Contains AI-generated content" label below each video. 该系列短剧以英国真人秀《Love Island》为蓝本，视频画面带有明显的 AI 生成瑕疵，TikTok 官方在每条视频下方强制标注「包含 AI 生成内容」。

The creator linked a Google Form on the account's homepage, openly soliciting plot directions from viewers, and replicated a classic segment from the live-action "Love Island" in the show—where the host publicly reads out viewer comments, transforming onlookers into co-creators. Each episode ends with a suspenseful hook, featuring narrative tropes like couple pairings, infidelity, and new contestants stirring up trouble, which has attracted numerous reality TV stars and influencer accounts to follow and interact. 创作者在账号主页挂载了一个 Google 表单，公开向观众征集剧情走向，并在节目中复刻真人版《Love Island》的经典环节——由主持人当众念出观众留言，将旁观者转化为共创者。每集结尾均设置悬念钩子，CP 配对、出轨、新人搅局等叙事套路悉数登场，并引发大量真人秀明星和网红账号跟进互动。

Currently, TikTok has removed 9 of these videos for violating community guidelines. The creator subsequently issued a statement on Instagram, emphasizing that each episode requires several hours for scriptwriting, scene design, and repeated revisions, and is not "effortless" as perceived by the public. 目前，TikTok 已以违反社区规定为由下架其中 9 条视频。创作者随后在 Instagram 发表声明，强调每集内容均需耗费数小时进行剧本创作、场景设计及反复修改，并非外界所认为的「毫不费力」。

🔗 Related reading: Single's Inferno AI Fruit Version, 300 Million Views in Ten Days, Clearly Bad But So Addictive 🔗 相关阅读： 单身即地狱 AI 水果版，十天收获3亿次观看，明明很烂但就是很上头

item.title: Netflix 再涨价，三档套餐齐上调
item.guid: Netflix-再涨价，三档套餐齐上调
item.description:
Netflix recently announced another price increase for all its subscription plans. This hike comes just about two months after Netflix's last price adjustment (in January this year), affecting all three tiers: Netflix 近期宣布再次上调旗下全部订阅套餐价格。此次涨价距 Netflix 上一轮提价（今年 1 月）仅约两个月，三档方案均受影响：

The ad-supported Standard plan's monthly fee increased from $7.99 to $8.99; the ad-free Standard plan (supporting two simultaneous devices) increased from $17.99 to $19.99; and the Premium plan (supporting four devices, Ultra HD, and HDR) increased from $24.99 to $26.99.

In fact, Netflix has adjusted its pricing almost every year recently: there were price increases in 2022, 2023, and 2024. In 2023, the basic plan for new users was officially removed, and in 2024, that tier was completely discontinued for all users. 事实上，Netflix 近年来几乎每年都在调整定价：2022 年、2023 年、2024 年均有提价动作，2023 年还正式下架了面向新用户的基础套餐，2024 年则对所有用户彻底停售该档位。
